allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $env:PORT="8765"; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","uaready.server" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; $body = '{"value":"bad..dots@example.com","kind":"email","lang":"ne"}'; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/validate -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing\).Content)

PowerShell($env:PORT="8765"; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","uaready.server" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2000; $body = '{"value":"bad..dots@example.com","kind":"email","lang":"ne"}'; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/validate -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing\).Content)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/ -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Length: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'send-go'\) { "send-go button: FOUND" } else { "send-go button: MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match 'sendTest'\) { "sendTest JS: FOUND" } else { "sendTest JS: MISSING" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/mail/ -UseBasicParsing; "mail/ Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Length: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; $body = '{"to":"bad..dots@example.com","subject":"hi","body":"see https://नेपाल.नेपाल/welcome and a bad link http://-bad-.example/x","lang":"ne"}'; "--- compose/validate \(Nepali, bad email + bad link\):"; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/compose/validate -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -SkipHttpErrorCheck\).Content)

PowerShell($body = '{"to":"bad..dots@example.com","subject":"hi","body":"see https://नेपाल.नेपाल/welcome and a bad link http://-bad-.example/x","lang":"ne"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/compose/validate -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\) | ForEach-Object { \(New-Object IO.StreamReader\($_\)\).ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell($body = '{"to":"bad..dots@example.com","subject":"hi","body":"see https://xn--l2bey1c2b.xn--l2bey1c2b/welcome and a bad link http://-bad-.example/x","lang":"ne"}'; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/compose/validate -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response; if \($r\) { $sr = New-Object IO.StreamReader\($r.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($payload = @{ to = "bad..dots@example.com"; subject = "hi"; body = "see https://example.com/welcome and a bad link http://-bad-.example/x"; lang = "ne" } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/compose/validate -Method POST -Body $payload -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $sr = New-Object IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "HTTP " + [int]$resp.StatusCode + ": " + $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($payload = @{ to = "user@example.com"; subject = "hi"; body = "see https://example.com/welcome and bad link http://-bad-.example/x"; lang = "ne" } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/compose/validate -Method POST -Body $payload -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $sr = New-Object IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { $_.Exception.Message } })
PowerShell($payload = '{"to":"user@example.com","subject":"hi","body":"see https://example.com/welcome and bad link http://-bad-.example/x","lang":"ne"}')
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
